overall.description: A cinematic game engine render of a tranquil medieval courtyard garden featuring a central stone fountain, enclosed by historic stone walls and lush spring vegetation. The static camera captures animated butterflies fluttering around the water feature under soft, diffused natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed courtyard garden with central fountain

events.description: yellow butterflies emerge from the left side and begin circling the fountain
additional white butterflies appear near the fountain surface, joining the yellow ones

agents.ego_description: stationary camera calmly observing the courtyard fountain and surrounding garden

notable_agents.action: yellow butterflies fluttering around the fountain water and landing on the stone edge
small white butterflies flying low over the cobblestone path

entered.detail: large circular stone fountain with multiple tiers and flowing water in the center of the courtyard
tall historic stone wall with crenellations enclosing the garden background
arched stone gateway set into the courtyard wall with decorative stonework
tall deciduous trees with fresh green spring foliage rising above the walls
dense bushes covered in white blossoms flanking the fountain area
clusters of purple flowers growing along the left side of the courtyard
weathered cobblestone and tile paving covering the courtyard ground

segments.scene_description: A peaceful enclosed courtyard garden rendered in high-quality game engine graphics, centered around a circular stone fountain with flowing water. The scene is framed by historic stone walls and lush spring vegetation including flowering bushes and tall trees. Animated butterflies in yellow and white flutter around the fountain throughout the clip, providing the primary motion in this otherwise static, contemplative scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, contemplative gaze upon a tranquil medieval courtyard garden centered around a flowing stone fountain. It begins by establishing the enclosed space, where historic stone walls frame a lush landscape of spring vegetation and flowering bushes. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward the circular fountain, highlighting the gentle movement of the water. The scene then settles into a peaceful rhythm as yellow and white butterflies flutter through the air, providing a delicate sense of life within the static, sun-dappled environment.
